summary: The streamer Argon hosts his sister, Ria, on a live stream to showcase her combat prowess as a Priest ahead of the Academy's bronze medal challenge. Despite the typical limitations of the Priest class, Ria demonstrates exceptional stats and uses a powerful greatsword, surprising the audience with her unique, aggressive combat style. Argon further enhances her potential by revealing she has mastered Holy Power Mastery to boost her attacks, solidifying her status as an elite combatant.
key_moments: Argon introduces his sister, Ria, to his stream audience to demonstrate her abilities.
Ria displays her high stats and effectively uses a unique greatsword to destroy a training dummy.
Argon explains how Ria manages to use high-level offensive techniques like sword energy through Holy Power Mastery.
